admin-accounting-settings-reset-tabs.name: Admin Accounting Settings — Reset Saved Filter Tabs
admin-accounting-settings-reset-tabs.description: Superuser restores the seeded default filter tabs per accounting view from /panel/accounting/settings: the 'Pestañas de filtros guardados' card lists the 6 views (Ingresos/Gastos/Hostings/Bolsillo/Recurrentes/Ads) each with a Restablecer button that, after a ConfirmModal warning about custom tabs, POSTs accounts/saved-filter-tabs/reset/ (delete + re-seed atomically) and toasts the result.

admin-mcps.name: Admin MCPs Connectors
admin-mcps.description: Superuser manages MCP connectors at /panel/mcps: each connector is a collapsible accordion row (name, connection-status badge, active toggle) that expands inline to reveal connection status, recent activity and the tool catalog in nested sub-accordions; generates/rotates the connector token (one-time URL modal with copy, GET /api/mcp-connectors/ + POST /api/mcp-connectors/<slug>/generate-token/), and toggles is_active. Includes the superuser gate: staff non-superusers are redirected to /panel.

admin-accounting-cards.name: Admin Accounting Card Snapshots
admin-accounting-cards.description: Superuser manages weekly credit-card balance snapshots at /panel/accounting/cards: list with latest-debt-per-card chip, filters (date range, debt range, card multi-select), create via modal (date defaults to today, card picked from a dropdown fed by the CreditCard catalog; the Deuda input is gone — debt is server-computed as cupo − disponible and previewed in the form, which blocks disponible > cupo), edit prefill (legacy names outside the catalog injected as an extra option) and delete with ConfirmModal. Registering a snapshot dated on/after the cycle Friday silences the weekly card-debt email reminder. The card filter defaults to the active catalog cards as removable chips (clearing them surfaces historical names); its options are the union of catalog and snapshot names, and a saved tab in the URL wins over the preselection.

admin-accounting-export.name: Admin Accounting Export
admin-accounting-export.description: Superuser exports accounting data: every list view has an Exportar dropdown (CSV / Excel .xlsx) that calls GET /api/accounting/export/ with the active filters mapped to server query params, and the dashboard has an Exportar Excel button that downloads the full workbook (summary sheet + one sheet per section) from /api/accounting/export/workbook/?year=.

admin-accounting-list-error-retry.name: Admin Accounting Lists — Load Error & Retry
admin-accounting-list-error-retry.description: When a GET /api/accounting/<entity>/ (or dashboard/, change-logs/, settings/) fails, the page replaces the table/summary with AccountingErrorState (data-testid=accounting-error-retry): a Spanish danger alert plus a Reintentar button that re-fires the page's load function. CRUD errors keep using toasts and never hide the table. Mirrors admin-diagnostic-list-error-retry.

admin-accounting-empty-state-cta.name: Admin Accounting Lists — Empty State CTA
admin-accounting-empty-state-cta.description: With zero records, accounting lists render BaseEmptyState with a primary 'Nuevo <entidad>' action that opens the create modal; with active filters and zero matches the action becomes 'Limpiar filtros' and resets the filter panel.

admin-proposal-discount-offer-send.name: Admin Proposal Discount Offer Send
admin-proposal-discount-offer-send.description: From /panel/proposals/:id/edit the seller opens the actions menu and picks 'Enviar oferta de descuento' — only shown when discount_percent > 0 and the client has an email. A modal renders the server-side email preview (POST /api/proposals/:id/email-preview/, template proposal_urgency); confirming sends the offer (POST /api/proposals/:id/discount-offer/send/ → ProposalEmailService.send_urgency_email force=True) and shows a success toast. Never auto-sent.

platform-password-reset.name: Platform Password Reset
platform-password-reset.description: Client recovers access from /platform/login → 'Olvidé mi contraseña': requests a reset code (POST /api/accounts/password-reset/request/), enters the 6-digit code (POST /api/accounts/password-reset/verify-code/) and sets a new password (POST /api/accounts/password-reset/confirm/), then returns to login. Public platform pages: forgot-password, verify-code, reset-password.

admin-client-first-login-notification.name: Admin Client First-Login Notification
admin-client-first-login-notification.description: When a platform client sets their password and logs in for the first time (POST /api/accounts/verify/, only when was_onboarded was False), client_flow_notifications fires a team milestone alert: an in-app notification to the project admins plus an email to the notification recipients. Best-effort; never blocks onboarding.
admin-client-first-login-notification.knownGaps: Server-triggered side-effect (in-app + email). Out of browser-E2E scope, consistent with the other system-triggered flows; may be asserted as a branch of platform-verify-onboarding.

admin-client-email-validated-notificatio.name: Admin Client Email-Validated Notification
admin-client-email-validated-notificatio.description: When a client confirms their email OTP from the documents portal (POST /api/accounts/email/verify/confirm/), client_flow_notifications fires a team milestone alert (in-app to project admins + email to recipients). Best-effort; already-verified confirmations do not re-notify.
admin-client-email-validated-notificatio.knownGaps: Server-triggered side-effect (in-app + email). Out of browser-E2E scope; may be asserted as a branch of platform-client-email-validation.

admin-client-document-signed-notificatio.name: Admin Client Document-Signed Notification
admin-client-document-signed-notificatio.description: When a client click-to-accept signs a document (POST /api/accounts/documents/:uuid/sign/), notify_team_document_signed_task fires a team milestone alert (in-app to project admins + email) and the client receives a signature-confirmation email. Best-effort; idempotent re-signs do not re-notify.
admin-client-document-signed-notificatio.knownGaps: Server-triggered side-effect (in-app + email). Out of browser-E2E scope; may be asserted as a branch of platform-client-document-sign.

admin-linkedin-module.name: Admin LinkedIn Content Module
admin-linkedin-module.description: Admin manages freeform LinkedIn posts at /panel/linkedin (sidebar section ProjectApp content): connection card shows OAuth status (connect/reconnect popup, token expiry date via GET /api/linkedin/status/), posts list from GET /api/linkedin/posts/ with status chips (Borrador/Programado/Publicado/Fallido), create/edit modal (commentary max 3000, optional image, optional schedule datetime) posting to /api/linkedin/posts/create/ | :id/update/, publish-now with confirm via POST /api/linkedin/posts/:id/publish/ (502 error surfaces inline), delete with confirm via /api/linkedin/posts/:id/delete/. Scheduled posts are published by Huey (ETA + minute sweep) server-side.
knownGaps: Scheduled auto-publish is a server-side Huey task — covered by backend tests, not browser E2E

admin-diagnostic-list-error-retry.name: Admin Diagnostic List — Load Error & Retry
admin-diagnostic-list-error-retry.description: When GET /api/diagnostics/ fails, the list page shows a dedicated error state (data-testid=diagnostics-error-state) with the normalized Spanish error message and a 'Reintentar' button that re-fires the fetch; an error notification is also raised via usePanelNotify. Distinct from the empty state. Covered by e2e/admin/admin-diagnostic-list-error-retry.spec.js.

admin-diagnostic-bulk-actions.name: Admin Diagnostic Bulk Actions
admin-diagnostic-bulk-actions.description: Admin selects diagnostics via row/header checkboxes in /panel/diagnostics; a batch bar appears with 'Finalizar aceptados' and 'Eliminar' (confirm modal), calling POST /api/diagnostics/bulk-action/ with {ids, action} and refreshing the list with a result notification. Covered by e2e/admin/admin-diagnostic-bulk-actions.spec.js.

admin-proposal-section-dirty-guard.name: Admin Proposal Section Dirty Guard
admin-proposal-section-dirty-guard.description: Unsaved-changes protection in the proposal section editor: editing a section shows a "Sin guardar" badge; collapsing a dirty section, navigating away, reloading or hitting the panel refresh button asks for confirmation before discarding edits.

admin-proposal-section-add-delete.name: Admin Proposal Section Add/Delete
admin-proposal-section-add-delete.description: Admin adds a missing section type from the "Agregar sección" modal (seeded server-side from language defaults via POST /api/proposals/:id/sections/create/) and deletes sections via the per-row trash action (DELETE /api/proposals/sections/:id/delete/), including the backend guard for functional requirements with a confirmed calculator selection.

admin-accounting-statements.name: Admin Accounting — Credit Card Statements
admin-accounting-statements.description: Superuser reviews the monthly credit-card statement ledger at /panel/accounting/statements: backend-driven year options (from the catalog's statements_since; months before it show 'No aplica') + card filters over a 12-month grid (Procesado/Borrador/Pendiente chips per card), inline statement detail (totals stat cards, category bars, transactions table flagging unidentified lines, 'Documento del extracto' PDF block with upload/view/replace/delete), finalize with forced-close confirm on total mismatch (POST /api/accounting/statements/:id/finalize/), reopen, delete, header edit modal and manual add-transaction on drafts, per-line edit/delete on drafts, collapsible learned merchant aliases with delete, and a 'Copiar prompt' button for the MCP chat kick-off. Statements are normally created from the claude.ai chat via the accounting MCP connector (create_statement).

admin-accounting-card-catalog.name: Admin Accounting — Credit Card Catalog
admin-accounting-card-catalog.description: Superuser manages the CreditCard catalog from the 'Catálogo de tarjetas' section at /panel/accounting/settings: per-row name, cupo (credit_limit), 'extractos desde' month and active toggle, with per-row save (POST /api/accounting/credit-cards/create/ or PATCH .../update/) and delete with confirm (DELETE .../delete/ returns credit_card_referenced when snapshots/statements reference the name — deactivate instead). The catalog feeds the Tarjetas form dropdown, the server-side debt computation (cupo − disponible) and the Extractos year/month range; changes are audited as the credit_card entity.

admin-hour-packages-view-modes.name: Admin Hour Packages — View Modes
admin-hour-packages-view-modes.description: Admin switches the hour-package catalog between Tabla, Tarjetas (card grid) and Comparativa (pricing tiers highlighting 'Mejor tarifa') via a BaseSegmented control; the initial mode comes from GET /api/hour-packages/admin/settings/ (default_view_mode).

admin-hour-packages-config.name: Admin Hour Packages — Configuración
admin-hour-packages-config.description: Admin opens the Configuración section of /panel/hour-packages: saves the default view mode (PATCH /api/hour-packages/admin/settings/update/, toast on save) and restores one nationality's catalog to the canonical DEFAULT_PACKAGES ladder behind a ConfirmModal (POST /api/hour-packages/admin/restore-defaults/, destructive replace).

admin-clients-config-tab.name: Admin Clients — Configuraciones Tab
admin-clients-config-tab.description: Admin activates the trailing 'Configuraciones' pill in the clients status-tab row: the list area swaps to the shared ViewSettingsPanel with the client saved-filter-tabs reset (ConfirmModal + POST accounts/saved-filter-tabs/reset/ with view=client, tabs reload on success) and a link to /panel/defaults.

admin-proposals-config-tab.name: Admin Proposals — Configuraciones Tab
admin-proposals-config-tab.description: Admin activates the fixed trailing 'Configuraciones' tab of the proposals filter-tab bar (right-aligned on desktop, select option on mobile): the list swaps to the shared ViewSettingsPanel with the proposal saved-filter-tabs reset (view=proposal) and a link to /panel/proposals/defaults. Selecting any filter tab closes the panel.

proposal-schedule-followup-reminder.name: Proposal Schedule Follow-up Reminder
proposal-schedule-followup-reminder.description: After rejecting with "not the right time", the client clicks the reminder CTA which POSTs proposals/:uuid/schedule-followup/ and flips to a scheduled-confirmation state.

admin-proposal-prompt.name: Admin Proposal Prompt Tab
admin-proposal-prompt.description: Admin copies, edits, downloads and resets the commercial and technical proposal-generation prompts from the Prompt tab (localStorage-persisted; parallel of admin-diagnostic-prompt).
knownGaps: No spec yet (2026-07 audit): copy/download/reset actions for both prompts are untested.

admin-proposal-dev-checklist.name: Admin Proposal Dev Checklist Tab
admin-proposal-dev-checklist.description: Admin generates, copies and downloads the Markdown developer checklist from the Desarrollo tab of an accepted proposal (client-side markdown build).
knownGaps: No spec yet (2026-07 audit): tab only appears for accepted proposals; refresh/copy/download untested.
